info.title: G CI/CD command line tool
info.description: G CI/CD command line tool to do what LabVIEW should

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: (G) LabVIEW CI/CD tool OR tool for (G) LabVIEW programmer with oCD.

commands.name: labview
commands.description: Commands for LabVIEW related tasks.

commands.name: build-spec
commands.description: Commands related to LabVIEW project build specification.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Command lists LabVIEW project build specification within a given project.

commands.name: set-version
commands.description: Command sets the version of LabVIEW project build specification

commands.name: build
commands.description: Command builds LabVIEW project build specification with provided version and output path.

commands.name: run-vi
commands.description: Command is a wrapper around LabVIEW CLI RunVI operation.

commands.name: build-project
commands.description: Command builds all (supported) build specifications from the project with provided version and output path.

commands.name: kill
commands.description: Command kills LabVIEW process if running.
